antipattern.description: Shipping anomaly thresholds straight from a tutorial without calibration.
antipattern.reason: Either fires constantly or never. Detector: thresholds match a known default constant. Fix: r3-calibrate-thresholds.

antipattern.description: Running LLM-judge on every query in production.
antipattern.reason: Cost and latency both blow up. Detector: judge calls / query == 1.0. Fix: r4-sampled-llm-judge.

antipattern.description: Alerting on a single high-latency query.
antipattern.reason: Noise floods the on-call channel. Detector: alert volume > 10/hour. Fix: r2-rolling-window.
